task: Analyze and outline distributed consensus architectures for Gateway Agents

traces.content: Queried local Knowledge Base for 'Gateway Consensus'. Found 12 distinct internal design drafts.
Identified that purely centralized databases become bottlenecks in MoFA Swarms. Decided to narrow search to Raft protocol and Event-Sourcing.
Cross-referenced Raft topology with Nacos service discovery logic. Sent draft compilation to Synthesizer-Agent-04 over gRPC.
Received feedback from Synthesizer-Agent-04: 'Missing considerations for split-brain network failures'.
Appended split-brain handling logic focusing on quorum vote requirements. Task designated completed and recorded to Long-Term Storage.
